message.entry: The ''R2012a'' and ''legacy'' flags are not supported.
VARS must specify the same variables in A and B.
A and B must contain the same variables.
You cannot specify the ''{0}'' flag more than once.
You can specify either ''sorted'' or ''stable'' but not both.
A and B must both be tables, or both be timetables.
Unrecognized flag ''{0}''. Valid flags are ''stable'' and ''sorted''.
Invalid input. Valid flags are ''stable'' and ''sorted''.
Invalid input. Valid flags must be strings or character vectors.
Unable to merge the ''{0}'' variables in A and B.
Code generation does not support Mx0 tables as inputs for ''{0}''.
